description: Seed anti-patterns: recurring mistakes that corrupt retail KPIs. Detect and block these during contract and pack review.

anti_patterns.name: KPI without owner
anti_patterns.problem: No accountable business owner, so policy ambiguities cannot be resolved or signed off.
anti_patterns.fix: Assign exactly one business owner before the contract reaches Seeded.

anti_patterns.name: KPI without grain
anti_patterns.problem: Aggregation behaviour is undefined; totals become unpredictable.
anti_patterns.detect: Contract Grain field missing or vague.

anti_patterns.name: DAX before metric contract
anti_patterns.problem: A measure is written before meaning is agreed, causing duplicated and divergent logic.
anti_patterns.detect: DAX exists with no passing contract.
anti_patterns.fix: Write and review the contract first; then hand off to the DAX layer.

anti_patterns.name: Summing percentages
anti_patterns.problem: Percentages added across levels produce nonsense.
anti_patterns.detect: A non-additive percentage is SUMmed in a total row.

anti_patterns.name: Averaging averages
anti_patterns.problem: Unweighted average of child averages misweights the result.
anti_patterns.detect: An average KPI is averaged across groups.

anti_patterns.name: Gross and net mixed
anti_patterns.problem: Gross sales and net sales used interchangeably in one measure or visual.
anti_patterns.detect: A measure mixes pre- and post-discount amounts; discount rate using net denominator.
anti_patterns.fix: Keep gross and net as distinct KPIs; discount rate uses gross (A4).

anti_patterns.name: Returns hidden inside sales without policy
anti_patterns.problem: Returns netted into sales as negative lines, hiding both true sales and true returns.
anti_patterns.detect: Sales measure silently nets returns; no transaction-type flag or separate fact.
anti_patterns.fix: Model returns separately or flag transaction type; state the policy (A2).

anti_patterns.name: VAT ambiguity ignored
anti_patterns.problem: Tax inclusion mixed across measures/branches, distorting revenue and margin.
anti_patterns.fix: Decide pre- vs post-tax once and apply consistently (A1).

anti_patterns.name: Target grain mismatch
anti_patterns.problem: Actuals compared with targets defined at a different grain.
anti_patterns.detect: Detailed actuals vs high-level targets, or misaligned calendars.
anti_patterns.fix: Align target grain and calendar to the actuals before computing variance.

anti_patterns.name: Inventory snapshot summed over time
anti_patterns.problem: Point-in-time stock summed across snapshot dates, multiplying the stock.
anti_patterns.detect: SUM of on-hand qty/cost across dates.
anti_patterns.fix: Treat as semi-additive: last or average over time, never SUM (A10, KPI-PAT-06).

anti_patterns.name: Aggregating on name instead of key
anti_patterns.problem: Grouping by product or branch name breaks when names change or duplicate.
anti_patterns.fix: Aggregate on the surrogate key; treat name as display only (A8, A9).
